features: LONG LASTING WARMTH 2 litre hot water bottle designed to retain heat for longer, keeping you warm and comfortable during cold weather.
SOFT FLEECE COVER INCLUDED Supplied with a soft fleece cover that feels gentle on the skin and helps spread warmth evenly.
STRONG AND DURABLE RUBBER Made from durable rubber for repeated everyday use, with a secure screw cap to help prevent leaks.
EASY AND SAFE TO USE Wide opening allows easy filling with hot water. No electricity needed – simple and reliable warmth at home.
ASSORTED DESIGNS Fleece covers are supplied in assorted colours and patterns. Design and colour may vary. One design will be sent at random.
SAFETY STANDARDS: Manufactured to comply with BS 1970:2012 British safety requirements for hot water bottles.
Please note: heat retention time may vary depending on water temperature, room temperature, and usage conditions.
description: Product description Stay warm and comfortable with this 2 Litre Hot Water Bottle with Soft Fleece Cover, designed to provide reliable, long-lasting warmth during cold days and nights. Manufactured from durable rubber and compliant with BS 1970:2012 British Safety Standards, this hot water bottle is suitable for regular home use. The wide neck opening allows easy and safe filling, while the secure screw cap helps minimise the risk of leaks. The soft fleece cover adds extra comfort and helps distribute heat evenly, preventing direct contact with hot rubber against the skin. Ideal for use in bed, relaxing at home, or staying cosy during winter, this reusable hot water bottle offers a simple, electricity-free heating solution. Assorted Designs: This product is supplied in assorted fleece colours and patterns. One design will be selected and sent at random. Indications Pain Relief Muscle Aches Joint Stiffness Menstrual Cramps Arthritis Pain Directions Fill the bottle with hot water, allow it to cool slightly, and apply it to the affected area for pain relief. See more
